codeReview.summary: The rerun directly closes the prior gap: `bounds_of_generics` now seeds `param_bounds` from outer generic declarations in `ItemImpl`, `ItemTraitImpl`, and `ItemTrait` before dispatching into `check_fn_decl`, so the generic-receiver lookup added in `b43379d` can see outer trait bounds as well as method-local ones.

summary: Review passed: compared with the failed `b43379d` change, commit `e7aeba8` fixes the remaining outer-bound propagation bug in all three affected item forms and adds focused regression coverage for impl methods, trait-impl methods, and trait default bodies.
